pr.title: Record: 0.1582 BPB — Learned Mixer Head + No TTT + Matrix LR 0.03

output.summary: Learned mixer head combines transformer states with frozen n-gram experts and a higher matrix LR to beat prior work without any TTT updates.
techniques: Learned mixer head predicts per-token weights for transformer and frozen n-gram experts
Matrix LR tuned to 0.03 after extensive screening
TTT removed to keep evaluation purely on training-updated model
